channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Investing in National Assets for Quantum Commercialization
item.description: Decades of public investment, world class research institutions, and the emergence of multiple high-performing regional innovation ecosystems have positioned the United States as a leader in quantum. Yet this position is neither assured nor self-sustaining.

item.title: Government as a Demand Creator for the Quantum Industry
item.description: To secure quantum leadership, the federal government should act as a credible demand creator—not just a funder of research and development and an ecosystem enabler. A federal funding ladder de-risks private investment and carries quantum technologies across the valley of death.

item.title: Chicago’s Emerging Quantum Innovation Cluster
item.description: Chicago is emerging as a major U.S. hub for quantum technology. Backed by world-class research institutions, strong state investment, and growing federal support, the region is building a powerful innovation ecosystem.
